inputs.label: Total Carbohydrates
inputs.businessContext: Total carbohydrates per serving as shown on nutrition facts label.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total carbohydrates per serving as shown on nutrition facts label.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besin değerleri etiketinde belirtilen porsiyon başına toplam karbonhidrat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kohlenhydrate insgesamt pro Portion gemäß Nährwerttabelle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Glucides totaux par portion selon l'étiquette nutritionnelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carbohidratos totales por porción según la etiqueta de información nutricional.

inputs.label: Dietary Fiber
inputs.businessContext: Dietary fiber per serving in grams. Fiber is subtracted because it is not digested.

businessContext_i18n.en: Dietary fiber per serving in grams. Fiber is subtracted because it is not digested.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gram cinsinden porsiyon başına diyet lifi. Lif sindirilmediği için çıkarılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ballaststoffe pro Portion in Gramm. Ballaststoffe werden abgezogen, da sie nicht verdaut werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fibres alimentaires par portion en grammes. Les fibres sont soustraites car elles ne sont pas digérées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fibra dietética por porción en gramos. La fibra se resta porque no se digiere.

inputs.label: Sugar Alcohols
inputs.businessContext: Sugar alcohols per serving (e.g., maltitol, sorbitol). Fully subtracted as they have minimal impact on blood sugar.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sugar alcohols per serving (e.g., maltitol, sorbitol). Fully subtracted as they have minimal impact on blood sugar.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Porsiyon başına şeker alkolleri (örn. maltitol, sorbitol). Kan şekeri üzerinde minimal etkileri olduğu için tamamen çıkarılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zuckeralkohole pro Portion (z. B. Maltit, Sorbit). Vollständig abgezogen, da sie minimale Auswirkungen auf den Blutzucker haben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Polyols par portion (p. ex., maltitol, sorbitol). Entièrement soustraits car leur impact sur la glycémie est minime.
businessContext_i18n.es: Alcoholes de azúcar por porción (ej., maltitol, sorbitol). Se restan completamente ya que tienen un impacto mínimo en el azúcar en sangre.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
